deck.name: Annotated Score
deck.effect: Opponent reveals 2 cards from hand; choose one to discard.

ability.name: Instagram Viral
ability.description: If both benches are full, she does 2x as much damage

ability.name: Profit Margins
ability.description: Right before your attack, you may discard a tool from Emily to draw 2 cards.

moves.name: Triple Stop
moves.effect: Flip three coins. Does 40 damage for each heads.

deck.name: Angel
deck.effect: Head Goon: Give all characters Goon status.

deck.name: Main Hall
deck.effect: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.
deck.description: Small Ensemble Limit: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.

ability.name: Getting Dressed
ability.description: While Fiona is on your bench, your active character has Maid status.

deck.name: Matcha Latte
deck.effect: All your characters heal 10 health.

deck.name: Dress Rehearsal Roster
deck.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

deck.name: Printed Score
deck.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand.

deck.name: Lio
deck.effect: New Canvas: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw six cards.

deck.name: Concert Ticket
deck.effect: Draw cards until you have 4 cards in hand.

ability.name: Euclidean Algorithm
ability.description: While this character is in play, if your opponent has more cards in their hand than you at the end of their next turn, they must discard cards until they have the same number.

deck.name: Concert Roster
deck.effect: Search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench.

deck.name: Concert Program
deck.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck.

deck.name: Maid Outfit
deck.effect: Forced Recruitment: Attached character gains Maid status while holding this tool.

hand.name: Alumnae Hall
hand.effect: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.
hand.description: Return by 4pm: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. Intense Reverb: While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.

hand.name: Camera
hand.effect: Shuffle up to two Supporter cards from your discard pile into your deck.

moves.name: Gacha Gaming
moves.effect: You may choose to draw cards, taking 20 damage for each card drawn (unaffected by any modifiers). If you get AVGE Birb, heal all damage from this card, and you get to keep all cards you drew. If you ever choose to stop drawing cards, you must shuffle them back into the deck. You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.name: Snap Pizz
moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

attachedTools.name: Kiki's Headband
attachedTools.effect: Delivery: Switch (retreat) cost is reduced by 1 energy.

moves.name: Small Ensemble Committee
moves.effect: If another small ensemble committee member is in play, this does 20 damage to each opposing character. If at least two of them are in play, it does 40 damage to each opposing character.

moves.name: Grand Piano
moves.effect: +20 damage if the stadium in play is a performance hall.

deck.name: Kiki's Headband
deck.effect: Delivery: Switch (retreat) cost is reduced by 1 energy.

deck.name: Concert Roster
deck.effect: Search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench.

deck.name: Printed Score
deck.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand.

ability.name: Nullify
ability.description: For the rest of the turn during which you played him, your opponents' abilities have no effect until the end of the turn.

moves.name: Damper Pedal
moves.effect: Damage of your opponent's next attack is halved (rounded up)

deck.name: Annotated Score
deck.effect: Opponent reveals 2 cards from hand; choose one to discard.

ability.name: Nausicaa's Undying Heartbeat
ability.description: (Ability) Nausicaa's Undying Heartbeat: If this character is at 60 or less health at the end of a turn, heal 20 damage from all of your other characters.

moves.name: Grand Piano
moves.effect: +20 damage if the stadium in play is a performance hall.

deck.name: Lio
deck.effect: New Canvas: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw six cards.

deck.name: Michelle
deck.effect: Discord Announcement: Opponent discards down to 2 cards in hand.

deck.name: Steinert Basement Studio
deck.effect: If you have exactly two character cards in play at the start of your turn, draw two cards instead of one. Each attack costs 1 additional energy.
deck.description: Duo Queue: If you have exactly two character cards in play at the start of your turn, draw two cards instead of one. 15 Minute Walk: Each attack costs 1 additional energy.

moves.name: Glissando
moves.effect: You cannot use this attack during your next turn.

moves.name: Improv
moves.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck. 80 more damage if it is an item.

deck.name: BAI Email
deck.effect: Discard any stadium in play. Your opponent cannot play a new stadium on their next turn.

deck.name: Friedman Hall
deck.effect: Draw two cards per turn. Your opponent chooses one for you to keep; shuffle the other back into your deck.
deck.description: Democratic Process: Draw two cards per turn. Your opponent chooses one for you to keep; shuffle the other back into your deck.

deck.name: Camera
deck.effect: Shuffle up to two Supporter cards from your discard pile into your deck.

ability.name: Reverse Heist
ability.description: While this character is in play, once per turn you may shuffle your discard pile and randomly choose 3 cards. Put all item/tool cards chosen on the top of your deck in any order. (You need at least 3 cards in your discard to do this)

moves.name: Damper Pedal
moves.effect: Damage of your opponent's next attack is halved (rounded up)

hand.name: Musescore Subscription
hand.effect: Grants Arranger status while attached.

hand.name: Concert Program
hand.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck.

hand.name: Dress Rehearsal Roster
hand.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

hand.name: Steinert Practice Room
hand.effect: Each player may not have more than 2 benched characters. If a player has 3, they discard one (the player who played this stadium discards first). Each attack costs 1 additional energy.
hand.description: Practice Prison: Each player may not have more than 2 benched characters. If a player has 3, they discard one (the player who played this stadium discards first). 15 Minute Walk: Each attack costs 1 additional energy.

hand.name: Concert Ticket
hand.effect: Draw cards until you have 4 cards in hand.

stadium.name: Riley Hall
stadium.effect: If this Stadium is active at the beginning of your turn, each of your characters takes 10 nonlethal damage for each empty bench slot you have.
stadium.description: Attendance Policy: If this Stadium is active at the beginning of your turn, each of your characters takes 10 nonlethal damage for each empty bench slot you have.

selectedCard.name: Kiki's Headband
selectedCard.effect: Delivery: Switch (retreat) cost is reduced by 1 energy.

deck.description: Small Ensemble Limit: Each player may only play up to three cards per turn, starting the turn after this is played.

ability.name: Getting Dressed
ability.description: While Fiona is on your bench, your active character has Maid status.

deck.name: Matcha Latte
deck.effect: All your characters heal 10 health.

deck.name: Dress Rehearsal Roster
deck.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

deck.name: Printed Score
deck.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand.

deck.name: Lio
deck.effect: New Canvas: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw six cards.

deck.name: Concert Ticket
deck.effect: Draw cards until you have 4 cards in hand.

ability.name: Euclidean Algorithm
ability.description: While this character is in play, if your opponent has more cards in their hand than you at the end of their next turn, they must discard cards until they have the same number.

deck.name: Concert Roster
deck.effect: Search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench.

deck.name: Concert Program
deck.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck.

deck.name: Maid Outfit
deck.effect: Forced Recruitment: Attached character gains Maid status while holding this tool.

hand.name: Alumnae Hall
hand.effect: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.
hand.description: Return by 4pm: Upon this Stadium being played, both players discard all items. Intense Reverb: While active, whenever a player draws a card, all their active and benched characters take 10 nonlethal damage.

hand.name: Kiki's Headband
hand.effect: Delivery: Switch (retreat) cost is reduced by 1 energy.

hand.name: Camera
hand.effect: Shuffle up to two Supporter cards from your discard pile into your deck.

moves.name: Gacha Gaming
moves.effect: You may choose to draw cards, taking 20 damage for each card drawn (unaffected by any modifiers). If you get AVGE Birb, heal all damage from this card, and you get to keep all cards you drew. If you ever choose to stop drawing cards, you must shuffle them back into the deck. You may not knock yourself out doing this.

moves.name: Snap Pizz
moves.effect: Discard 2 energy from one of your opponent's characters.

deck.name: Concert Ticket
deck.effect: Draw cards until you have 4 cards in hand.

moves.name: Small Ensemble Committee
moves.effect: If another small ensemble committee member is in play, this does 20 damage to each opposing character. If at least two of them are in play, it does 40 damage to each opposing character.

moves.name: Grand Piano
moves.effect: +20 damage if the stadium in play is a performance hall.

deck.name: Kiki's Headband
deck.effect: Delivery: Switch (retreat) cost is reduced by 1 energy.

deck.name: Concert Roster
deck.effect: Search your deck for a specific character and place it onto your bench.

deck.name: Printed Score
deck.effect: Opponent reveals their entire hand.

ability.name: Nullify
ability.description: For the rest of the turn during which you played him, your opponents' abilities have no effect until the end of the turn.

moves.name: Damper Pedal
moves.effect: Damage of your opponent's next attack is halved (rounded up)

deck.name: Annotated Score
deck.effect: Opponent reveals 2 cards from hand; choose one to discard.

ability.name: Nausicaa's Undying Heartbeat
ability.description: (Ability) Nausicaa's Undying Heartbeat: If this character is at 60 or less health at the end of a turn, heal 20 damage from all of your other characters.

moves.name: Grand Piano
moves.effect: +20 damage if the stadium in play is a performance hall.

deck.name: Lio
deck.effect: New Canvas: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw six cards.

deck.name: Michelle
deck.effect: Discord Announcement: Opponent discards down to 2 cards in hand.

deck.name: Steinert Basement Studio
deck.effect: If you have exactly two character cards in play at the start of your turn, draw two cards instead of one. Each attack costs 1 additional energy.
deck.description: Duo Queue: If you have exactly two character cards in play at the start of your turn, draw two cards instead of one. 15 Minute Walk: Each attack costs 1 additional energy.

moves.name: Glissando
moves.effect: You cannot use this attack during your next turn.

moves.name: Improv
moves.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck. 80 more damage if it is an item.

deck.name: BAI Email
deck.effect: Discard any stadium in play. Your opponent cannot play a new stadium on their next turn.

deck.name: Friedman Hall
deck.effect: Draw two cards per turn. Your opponent chooses one for you to keep; shuffle the other back into your deck.
deck.description: Democratic Process: Draw two cards per turn. Your opponent chooses one for you to keep; shuffle the other back into your deck.

deck.name: Camera
deck.effect: Shuffle up to two Supporter cards from your discard pile into your deck.

ability.name: Reverse Heist
ability.description: While this character is in play, once per turn you may shuffle your discard pile and randomly choose 3 cards. Put all item/tool cards chosen on the top of your deck in any order. (You need at least 3 cards in your discard to do this)

moves.name: Damper Pedal
moves.effect: Damage of your opponent's next attack is halved (rounded up)

hand.name: Musescore Subscription
hand.effect: Grants Arranger status while attached.

hand.name: Concert Program
hand.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck.

hand.name: Dress Rehearsal Roster
hand.effect: Look at top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one and discard the other two.

hand.name: Steinert Practice Room
hand.effect: Each player may not have more than 2 benched characters. If a player has 3, they discard one (the player who played this stadium discards first). Each attack costs 1 additional energy.
hand.description: Practice Prison: Each player may not have more than 2 benched characters. If a player has 3, they discard one (the player who played this stadium discards first). 15 Minute Walk: Each attack costs 1 additional energy.

stadium.name: Riley Hall
stadium.effect: If this Stadium is active at the beginning of your turn, each of your characters takes 10 nonlethal damage for each empty bench slot you have.
stadium.description: Attendance Policy: If this Stadium is active at the beginning of your turn, each of your characters takes 10 nonlethal damage for each empty bench slot you have.
